text: Entering this space, I am immediately struck by the interplay of glass, color, and light—a sense of transition, as if pausing on the threshold of discovery. As I venture further and read the words on the wall, I feel a growing anticipation and curiosity. There is a palpable energy in the air, a mingling of contemplation and inventiveness that makes me eager to witness what these walls and displays will reveal. I am reminded of the joy of learning and the quiet thrill that comes from stepping into a space designed for exploration and creativity.
